subject: final report from the cal px on the summer prices

emails.subject: Re: Final report from the Cal PX on the summer prices
emails.subject_base: Final report from the Cal PX on the summer prices
emails.body: Re: Final report from the Cal PX on the summer prices Thanks for the report. The PX does have a 30 minute live camera of the PX trading floor! Mike

emails.subject: Final report from the Cal PX on the summer prices
emails.subject_base: Final report from the Cal PX on the summer prices
emails.body: Here's one that's "final," not draft, that just came out. I'm assuming that this is the one the press is refering to. Let me know that you think. Forwarded by Jeff Dasovich/NA/Enron on 10/09/2000 11:43 AM Sarah Novosel 10/02/2000 03:47 PM

emails.subject: Re: Final report from the Cal PX on the summer prices
emails.subject_base: Final report from the Cal PX on the summer prices
emails.body: Re: Final report from the Cal PX on the summer prices Jeff, Apparently there was a draft report (5 page) issued on Thursday Oct. 5th from the CA PX. Let me know if you happen to come accross this report. Thanks. From: Jeff Dasovich@ENRON on 10/09/2000 11:45 AM CDT Sent by: Jeff Dasovich@ENRON
